spotlight_1.name: Algo Baileymol (Chaos Monger)
spotlight_1.thesis_one_liner: Algo Baileymol (Chaos Monger) tests whether systematic price rotation can capture persistent sector momentum better than passive market exposure.
spotlight_1.teaser_hook: Academically validated signal with live trading receipts

spotlight_2.name: Retail Sales Momentum
spotlight_2.thesis_one_liner: Retail Sales Momentum tests whether consumer behavior can reveal consumer stress or demand rotation before it shows up in sector performance.
spotlight_2.teaser_hook: Alternative data experiment tracked live in public
